[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111111 6
1 1010001 3
2 0001101 3
3 1101011 5
4 1100100 3
5 1010101 4
6 1011110 5
7 0111111 6

12 1000000 1
